items.name: agent-browser
items.title: Agent Browser
items.description: Browser automation skill for using the baked agent-browser runtime from an OpenCode agent.

items.name: support-agent
items.title: Customer support agent
items.description: Triages Plain support threads, investigates with the codebase and Stripe, and resolves or drafts a reply — holding sensitive actions for approval.

items.name: customer-support
items.title: Customer support on autopilot
items.description: An agent that works the Plain support queue: it checks for new threads, investigates with the codebase and Stripe, and resolves or drafts a reply — holding refunds and account changes for human approval.

envVars.PLAIN_API_KEY: Plain API key (read + reply in support threads)
envVars.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: Stripe secret key with read access to customers and invoices

inputs.label: How often to check the support queue

triggers.name: Support queue triage
triggers.prompt: Check Plain for new or unanswered support threads. For each, investigate using the codebase and the customer's Stripe billing state, then resolve the thread directly or draft a reply with the diagnosis attached. Hold refunds, plan changes, and anything touching a customer's money or account state for human approval.
